def find_first_match(items, target):
    index = 0
    while True:
        try:
            if items[index] == target:
                return index
            index += 1
        except IndexError:
            return -1

def process_until_sentinel(data_stream):
    results = []
    while True:
        try:
            item = next(data_stream)
            if item is None:
                break
            results.append(transform(item))
        except StopIteration:
            break
    return results

def transform(item):
    return item * 2
